name: Synovus Financial Corp. Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series D Liquation Preference $25.00 per Share
summary: Synovus Financial Corp. Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series D Liquation Preference $25.00 per Share represents a series of preferred stock issued by Synovus Financial Corporation. This preferred stock has a fixed-to-floating interest rate and is non-cumulative, meaning that unpaid dividends do not accrue. The liquidation preference is $25.00 per share.
